card_description: Jesus (Hebrew/Aramaic: "Yahweh saves") is a divine or mythological figure appearing in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. In the biblical tradition, Jesus is central figure of christianity; teacher and messiah. Core of PKD's christological theology in the Exegesis. Appears in 12 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Jesus. Context: "Conclusion of Section 1."
